Analog Recall Engine / ARE.strongest: clairetech2025-max/claire claire_are/ for active implementation; Claire-Systems/Analog-Recall-Engine-Legacy as public legacy reference
Analog Recall Engine / ARE.visibility: PUBLIC OPEN-SOURCE reference only after security/patent review

BitBrain.strongest: same GitHub repo plus local payload; current public visibility conflicts with private name

CLAIRE.strongest: clairetech2025-max/claire plus current live local branch /home/LuciusPrime/claire
CLAIRE.visibility: PRIVATE DEVELOPMENT initially; split public demo later

CourtListener integration.strongest: claire-veritas-legal for legal product; CLAIRE for integrated demo

DARPA-related prototypes.strongest: claire monorepo demos plus APEX prototype

Hugging Face deployment.strongest: claire monorepo scaffolds; HF Space currently separate stale Gradio snapshot per prior check
Hugging Face deployment.visibility: PRIVATE DEVELOPMENT / PUBLIC DEMONSTRATION after parity

Legal evidence ingestion.strongest: claire-veritas-legal standalone plus CLAIRE integration adapters
Legal evidence ingestion.visibility: PRIVATE CUSTOMER / LEGAL DATA for data-bearing branches; public demo only sanitized

Librarian.strongest: clairetech2025-max/ARE-Librarian, but current scan found very small/doc-like tree and needs manual source review

candidates: Veritas mobile routes in claire monorepo
Mobile Android interface.final: Claire-Systems/claire-mobile or inside Claire-Systems/claire depending release boundary
Mobile Android interface.strongest: current /home/LuciusPrime/claire branch contains latest mobile-first CLAIRE UI work

OfficeAI.strongest: README repo for public docs; private empty repo for future code
OfficeAI.visibility: PUBLIC DOCUMENTATION plus PRIVATE COMMERCIAL code if built

Session Capsule Protocol.strongest: session_capsule_protocol as canonical docs/protocol; bootstrap as starter/legacy

candidates: clairetech2025-max/claire claire_are, sentinel, diode guard, lane classifier
Shared governance infrastructure.final: Claire-Systems/shared-governance or inside claire until stable

Veritas Legal.strongest: clairetech2025-max/claire-veritas-legal for standalone product; preserve CLAIRE route integrations separately
Veritas Legal.visibility: PRIVATE COMMERCIAL until legal/privacy review clears public demo subset
